sourceAmbiguity: The blueprint says contradictory capture must fail closed but does not define disagreement semantics.
decisionTaken: Structured request-type capture conflicting with transcript symptom or red-flag evidence creates unresolved contradiction and manual_review_only.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: It prevents keypad or transcript facts from silently overriding each other when safety meaning may differ.
operationalRisk: Some benign menu mistakes will require staff transcription or follow-up.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Add governed correction outcomes that can settle contradictionPosture = resolved.
